subcodes.first_line: Your successive letters have been received, and most of them have attained unto the outpourings of the True Bestower, that is to say, through His glances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مراسلات آنجناب پی در پی رسید و اکثر آن بفیوضات فیاض حقیقی فائز یعنی بلحاظ
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @high station of teachers of the Cause
